name: @mushi-mushi/e2e-dogfood
description: End-to-end Playwright suite that drives the full Mushi Mushi PDCA loop (Plan → Do → Check → Act) against a local Supabase + admin dev stack. Mocks GitHub by default (msw); set E2E_LIVE_GITHUB=1 to hit real GitHub.

scripts.test: echo 'e2e-dogfood is driven by pnpm e2e, not pnpm test (requires a live Supabase + admin stack)' && exit 0
